title: Winey Creamy Saudi-Arabian Seafood Skillet
description: A flavorful and quick one-pot dish featuring a mix of frozen seafood, served with a side of toast and a drizzle of wine sauce.

ingredients.name: 1 package of frozen seafood mix (shrimp, scallops, mussels)

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 1 onion, chopped and cook until translucent.
Add 2 cloves of garlic, minced and cook for 1 minute.
Add 1 cup of white wine and cook until reduced by half.
Add 1 cup of heavy cream and stir to combine.
Add the seafood mix and cook until pink and cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
